You're right -- the search turned up no SDF text code anywhere in the project (nor in the library catalogue).

The only text-related shader is the very primitive 5x7 bitmap renderer in "Text Renderer" (fdd1).  
If you have a dedicated SDF text template that isn't present yet, either:

- paste the GLSL here now so I can save it as a new node, or  
- give me the node id / filename where you keep the real template so I can copy it.

Let me know which way you want to go.
